x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware asset volume determines the breadth of Now Assist HAM AI analysis. Without sufficient asset records, AI refresh recommendations and lifecycle insights are limited in scope and reliability.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: total + " hardware assets. Now Assist HAM has sufficient asset data for AI-powered lifecycle analysis and refresh recommendations." }; } else if (total >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets (target: 500+). Now Assist HAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the hardware estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets. Insufficient data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all hardware assets are tracked in ServiceNow. Import asset records from existing asset repositories or enable Discovery to automatically populate hardware asset records.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c77
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Hardware asset volume determines the breadth of Now Assist HAM AI analysis. Without sufficient asset records, AI refresh recommendations and lifecycle insights are limited in scope and reliability.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Hardware Asset Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: total + " hardware assets. Now Assist HAM has sufficient asset data for AI-powered lifecycle analysis and refresh recommendations." }; } else if (total >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets (target: 500+). Now Assist HAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the hardware estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets. Insufficient data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HAM</module><number>CHK0000609</number><order>200</order><remediation_guidance>Ensure all hardware assets are tracked in ServiceNow. Import asset records from existing asset repositories or enable Discovery to automatically populate hardware asset records.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c77</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Hardware Asset Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c77</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
